title: NameIT
description: This is the modpack for NameIT smp it has create mod and other mods
body:
> **🌍 YOUR LEGACY BEGINS AT NAMEIT 🏛️**
> 
> Tired of servers that lag or reset just as you start building? **NameIt** is a 1.20.1 Civilization project built for stability, diplomacy, and massive empires.
> 
> ✅ **EU Based:** High-speed performance for a smooth, lag-free experience.
> ✅ **Shape History:** Form nations, declare wars, and build a living economy.
> 
> 
> **Be part of the first generation:**
> https://discord.gg/a76cSUnmpk
